contact_card_onboarding.identity_creation: app/src/context/NostrIdentityContext.tsx:174-183 — keypair generated silently on first mount, unconditional. No onboarding wizard exists.
contact_card_onboarding.name_gate_predicate: app/src/lib/shareCard.ts:125 — hasShareableName(nickname); single source of truth, reused by 5 call sites.
contact_card_onboarding.profile_save_chokepoint: app/src/context/ProfileContext.tsx:52-58 — saveProfile applies 32-byte UTF-8 nickname cap + avatar backfill; only nickname writer.
contact_card_onboarding.pairing_name_nudge: app/pages/profile.tsx:342-352 — non-blocking Alert, ?pairing=1 only; NOT reused by this epic (DD-2).
contact_card_onboarding.contact_card_signed: app/src/lib/contactCard.ts:617-630 — v1 verifyEvent on reconstructed kind-0; v2 signs synthetic preimage binding header/pubkey/created_at/expires_at/nonce/name.
contact_card_onboarding.adr_009: docs/adr/ADR-009-*.md — issuer (passive party) requires human confirmation even with authenticated handshake; scanner (active party) auto-admits. Bearer-credential threat model. Status: Proposed.

group_invite_link_flow.join_card: app/src/components/groups/JoinRequestCard.tsx — rendered by pages/groups.tsx:544-554 when join+admin+name params present. Gates: hydration/identity (43-59), invalid admin npub (61-70), already-member (39-41). No name check.
group_invite_link_flow.join_request_send: app/src/lib/marmot/joinRequestSender.ts:117-141 sendJoinRequest; buildJoinRequestRumor:27-44 emits {type,nonce,name:groupName}; buildGiftWrap:56-112 hand-rolls the kind-13 seal WITHOUT signing it (only outer kind-1059 signed with ephemeral key).
group_invite_link_flow.join_request_handler: app/src/lib/marmot/joinRequestHandler.ts:56-94 — hardcodes nickname:undefined at :88; PendingJoinRequest.nickname? already in type.
group_invite_link_flow.admin_row: app/src/components/groups/PendingRequestsSection.tsx:30-41 — ALREADY co-renders truncateNpub as secondary text alongside nickname (line 34 is only the primary-name expr). DD-6 co-render structurally satisfied.
group_invite_link_flow.unwrap_shared: app/src/lib/marmot/welcomeSubscription.ts:40-68 unwrapGiftWrap — NO seal signature verify, NO rumor.pubkey===seal.pubkey check; returns rumor.pubkey??''. SHARED by kind-444 (Welcome) and kind-21059 (join request) — unwraps first, branches on kind at 165-194. Stale doc comment ~199-211 wrongly claims rumor is signed.
group_invite_link_flow.safe_unwrap_reference: app/src/lib/directMessages.ts:230-274 unwrapAndOpen — verifies seal schnorr sig (:250), decrypts with authenticated seal pubkey, asserts rumor.pubkey===seal.pubkey (:262). Doc comment: 'closes the Mallory forgery vector'. Imports nostr-tools/nip59.
group_invite_link_flow.pull_only_queue: app/src/lib/marmot/welcomeSubscription.ts:196-238 enqueuePendingInvitation (localStorage lp_pendingInvitations_v1); acceptPendingInvitation:451-513 -> joinGroupFromWelcome. acceptPendingInvitation returns early unless entry in queue.
group_invite_link_flow.pending_card: app/src/components/groups/PendingInvitations.tsx — AC-INVITE-4 locks display to truncated pubkey + relative timestamp + Accept + Decline. Rendered at pages/groups.tsx:614.
group_invite_link_flow.sibling_stores: app/src/lib/marmot/joinRequestStorage.ts, inviteLinkStorage.ts — IndexedDB, keyed by natural id; conventions to mirror for the new outbound-record store.
group_invite_link_flow.known_peers: MarmotContext effect on [groups,pubkeyHex] appends member pubkeys to lp_knownPeers_v1 (append-only, ADR-002/005). Auto-accept routing through joinGroupFromWelcome populates this identically to manual accept.
group_invite_link_flow.welcome_wire_format: @internet-privacy/marmot-ts createWelcomeRumor — kind-444 rumor carries base64 MLS Welcome + relays + encoding + optional e-tag. NO nonce, no injection hook. Seal IS signed (applesauce sealRumor -> signer.signEvent). readWelcomeMarmotGroupData exposes group name/id pre-join (attacker-chosen, not a correlation input).
group_invite_link_flow.e2e: app/tests/e2e/groups-invite-link.spec.ts — full flow, both users pre-named (lines 65-66); nameless path unexercised. groups-join-request-live.spec.ts — live-refresh regression.

i18n.profile_pairing_prompt: app/src/lib/i18n.ts:384 pairingNameSetupPrompt (reference for tone, not reused).

constraints.privacy_invariant: No public kind-0 ever. Profile data only via MLS group rumors or NIP-59 gift wraps (addressed+encrypted). Join-request nickname rides the existing gift wrap to admin — compliant.
constraints.static_export: query params only, no dynamic path segments.
constraints.i18n: en+de in app/src/lib/i18n.ts via useCopy(); no hardcoded strings.
constraints.e2e: publish through the app, never raw WebSocket; full suite is the gate.
constraints.testing: vitest, tests/unit/**/*.test.ts; no jsdom/@testing-library; no component-render/snapshot capability.
